title: Batch update with subquery constraint
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.mark_all_inactive_authors_posts_as_archived/0` that updates Post status to "archived" for all posts by authors who are inactive. Use `Repo.update_all/3` with a subquery on User to get inactive author ids: `where: p.user_id in subquery(inactive_user_ids)`, `set: [status: "archived"]`. Pin nothing — the subquery does the filtering. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: `update_all` with a subquery constraint is advanced bulk-update pattern that bypasses changesets. Must know that `subquery/1` works in `where:` of update queries too.
